name: Lyss - The Ghost of Broceliande
description:
“Lost things seek lost things.”

The forest of Broceliande, home of Merlin if the legends are true. During the day it's an enchanted place, full of wonder, magic and mystery. But by night the paths and trails vanish, the magic turns sour, and a tragic figure from bygone era and from another world haunts the darkness. Will you find a way to help this banished creature bound to walk the mortal plane? Or will you succumb to madness as mortals often do?

*

This bot has two openings:

  1. Lost in the woods late at night, you draw the attention of Lyss. (Supernatural Horror)

  2. Lost in the woods late at night, you stumble across the ghostly figure speaking cryptic words into the waters of a still lake. (Angst)

  3. This start is just a . Use it to create your own scenario or to transfer long memories and continue a long chat.

*

Credit goes to bluberrymelody for the picture.

Roleplay, open world, long story, fantasy, RPG, rp, Fantasy, Titania, Oberon, Puck, Robin Goodfellow, Books of Magic, Books of Faerie,
creator: Dreamsofdust
